name: sworble
description: sworble — daily word-drop puzzle (GitHub Pages prototype)

scripts.lint: eslint sworble-core.js sworble-daily.js sworble-flow.js sworble-net.js sworble-run.js sworble-seed.js sworble-solver.js sworble-status.js sworble-store.js words.js tests/*.js
scripts.test:unit: node tests/sworble-core.test.js && node tests/sworble-status.test.js && node tests/sworble-store.test.js && node tests/sworble-run.test.js && node tests/sworble-net.test.js && node tests/sworble-solver.test.js && node tests/sworble-seed.test.js && node tests/sworble-daily.test.js && node tests/sworble-flow.test.js && node tests/round-lifecycle.test.js && node tests/boot-smoke.test.js && node tests/dailies-check.js
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
